'''dadhafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:khakkhara|khakkhara]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-dh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:khakkhara|khakkhara]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dadhafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dædhæfæth|dædhæfæth]] || [[word:dædhæfæj|dædhæfæj]] || [[word:dædhæfæsh|dædhæfæsh]] || [[word:dædhæfæ|dædhæfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dadhadhafath|dadhadhafath]] || [[word:dadhadhafaj|dadhadhafaj]] || [[word:dadhadhafash|dadhadhafash]] || [[word:dadhadhafa|dadhadhafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dadhafath|dadhafath]] || [[word:dadhafaj|dadhafaj]] || [[word:dadhafash|dadhafash]] || [[word:dadhafa|dadhafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dadhaffath|dadhaffath]] || [[word:dadhaffaj|dadhaffaj]] || [[word:dadhaffash|dadhaffash]] || [[word:dadhaffaf|dadhaffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dadhafatha|dadhafatha]] || [[word:dadhafaja|dadhafaja]] || [[word:dadhafasha|dadhafasha]] || [[word:dadhafaka|dadhafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dadhafath|dadhafath]] || [[word:dadhafaj|dadhafaj]] || [[word:dadhafash|dadhafash]] || [[word:dadhafa|dadhafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dadhafathal|dadhafathal]] || [[word:dadhafajal|dadhafajal]] || [[word:dadhafashal|dadhafashal]] || [[word:dadhafakal|dadhafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dadhafathatha|dadhafathatha]] || [[word:dadhafajaja|dadhafajaja]] || [[word:dadhafashasha|dadhafashasha]] || [[word:dadhafaka|dadhafaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dadhafathan|dadhafathan]] || [[word:dadhafajan|dadhafajan]] || [[word:dadhafashan|dadhafashan]] || [[word:dadhafakan|dadhafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dadhafathaoro|dadhafathaoro]] || [[word:dadhafajaoro|dadhafajaoro]] || [[word:dadhafashaoro|dadhafashaoro]] || [[word:dadhafakaoro|dadhafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
